posts.author: Tommy (Tomas Salamon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

We are currently experiencing challenges with archiving items from one board to another within Monday.com. Our goal is to archive items at specific times throughout the year. However, we’re encountering issues when trying to move items from Board A to Board B, particularly when Board A has undergone changes such as the addition of new columns or statuses that Board B does not have.

Is there a way to archive items to Board B without losing any data, even if Board B is not identical to Board A?

Thank you in advance.
